title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: Syncing the scrolls
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just gave the API documentation a quick polish to keep everything perfectly in sync with production.
gist.summary: Automated sync of APIDOCS.md to reflect the latest OpenAPI spec changes following a production deployment.
gist.impact: Developers referencing the API documentation will see the most up-to-date specifications.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the robot companion organizing scrolls or reading a glowing book of documentation. The robot is printing out a tiny receipt representing the minor automated update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot organizing glowing scrolls of documentation in a warm wooden library. The robot is printing a tiny receipt. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
